description_long: This house features a simple rectangular structure with a dark gray exterior and a prominent brown gable roof made of corrugated material. The front facade includes a main entry door with a small window above it and two additional rectangular windows, all framed in a warm yellow-orange color. The side walls are plain, with one side displaying a single window and the other side being windowless. The roof extends slightly beyond the walls, providing minimal eaves. The overall design is utilitarian, with no decorative elements or architectural embellishments. The house appears to be a single-story dwelling, suitable for suburban or rural neighborhoods.
description: A single-story, rectangular house with a brown gable roof, dark gray walls, and yellow-orange framed windows and door.
description_view_0: This view shows the side of the house with two vertically stacked windows and no visible door.
description_view_1: This view displays the gable end of the house with a single centered window and the sloped roof above.
description_view_2: This is the front view, featuring the main entry door with a window above it and two additional windows, all with yellow-orange frames.
description_view_3: This view shows the opposite gable end, which is plain and windowless, highlighting the roof's slope.
attribute_entryway_design: Simple main door with a small window above, no porch or decorative elements
